# Python LSP Server (https://github.com/python-lsp/python-lsp-server) test

# Start acme-lsp server
acme-lsp -headless -hidediag -server '\.py$:pylsp' &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.py after-format.txt

# Definition of "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#132'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello.py:.*:class Greeter:'

# References to "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#132'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello.py:.*:class Greeter:'
stdout 'hello.py:.*:.*g = Greeter()'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#144'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello.py:1.7,1.14:class Greeter:'

# Signature of method "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#151'
L -headless sig
stdout 'hello\(\)'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Hover over call to method "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#147'
L -headless hov
stdout 'hello\(\)'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Implementation query is not supported
#env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#147'
#L -headless impls

# Completion in middle of method "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#147'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello\(\)'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'hello'
stdout 'main'
stdout '/hello.py:'

# Query workspace symbols is not supported
#L -headless wss Greeter

# Rename Greeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#132'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.py after-rename-py.txt


-- hello.py --
class Greeter:
    def hello( self ):
        """Hello prints a hello greeting"""
        print( "Hello, 世界" )

def main():
    g = Greeter( )
    g.hello( )

if __name__=="__main__":
    main( )
-- after-format.txt --
class Greeter:
    def hello(self):
        """Hello prints a hello greeting"""
        print("Hello, 世界")


def main():
    g = Greeter()
    g.hello()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
-- after-rename-py.txt --
class WorldGreeter:
    def hello(self):
        """Hello prints a hello greeting"""
        print("Hello, 世界")


def main():
    g = WorldGreeter()
    g.hello()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
